name: SportsQuest, Inc.
summary: PART I Corporate History SportsQuest, Inc. (the Company or SPQS), was formed under the laws of the State of Delaware on April 3, 1986 under the name Bay Head Ventures, Inc. On July 29, 1988 the Company acquired 100% of the issued and outstanding shares of A.B. Park & Fly, Inc. On December 8, 1988, the Company changed its name to Air Brook Airport Express, Inc.
